overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in traditional armor with a straw hat and white cape running through the Takeshiri Farmstead at night during a storm. The character moves through rural farmland with wooden buildings and fields before entering a dark farmhouse interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland with scattered wooden farmhouses and fences

events.description: location name 'TAKESHIRI FARMSTEAD' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: sprinting through muddy farmland past wooden fences and traditional farm buildings

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden farmhouse with dark timber walls
wooden plank fence running along the right side of the path
small structure with traditional thatched roof in the distance
lit paper lantern hanging from a post near the farmhouse

segments.scene_description: The character runs through open farmland at night during a storm, passing traditional wooden farmhouses and fences. A lit hanging lantern marks the entrance to the Takeshiri Farmstead as the location name appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: agricultural fields with tall crops and haystacks

agents.ego_description: continuing to sprint through fields with tall grass and passing haystacks

entered.detail: fields of tall crops and grass surrounding the dirt path
large haystack piled in the field to the right
farmhouse visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character runs through agricultural fields with tall grass and haystacks, moving away from the initial farm buildings toward more distant structures. The wooden fence that was on the right now appears on the left in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmhouse courtyard with white flowers and wooden structures

events.description: approaching the dark entrance of the main farmhouse building

agents.ego_description: running toward the main farmhouse building, slowing slightly as approaching the entrance

entered.detail: large traditional wooden farmhouse with stacked firewood on the exterior wall
bushes with white flowers lining the path near the farmhouse
gnarled dead tree trunk near the farmhouse entrance
stacked wooden barrels beside the farmhouse wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the main farmhouse building, passing white flower bushes and wooden barrels. The scene becomes more enclosed as the character nears the dark entrance of the building, transitioning from open fields to the farmhouse courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wooden farmhouse interior with lit lanterns

events.description: character enters the dark interior of the farmhouse
character slows to a walk while moving past seated villagers inside

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark farmhouse interior, passing seated NPCs and examining the space

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on the floor inside the house near a lantern

entered.detail: dark wooden interior walls and support beams of the farmhouse
lit paper lantern providing warm light inside the dark room
wooden shelving unit with stored items along the wall
window showing exterior light at the far end of the room

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark farmhouse interior, transitioning from the stormy night to a dimly lit space illuminated by paper lanterns. Inside, wooden shelves line the walls and villagers sit on the floor as the character explores the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a storm-lashed rural landscape that shifts from a clustered farmstead entrance into open, wind-swept agricultural fields. It begins with the character sprinting past traditional wooden farmhouses and fences under a dark night sky, passing a lit hanging lantern that marks the entrance to the Takeshiri Farmstead. As the character pushes forward, the camera tracks their movement away from the initial buildings and deeper into the countryside. The scene then expands into wide fields of tall grass and haystacks, where the perspective shifts so that the wooden fencing recedes into the distance on the left. Finally, the movement carries the character further across the rain-soaked terrain toward more distant structures looming in the storm.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the stormy openness of a rural farmstead into the sheltered, dim interior of a farmhouse. It begins with the character approaching the main building, passing white flower bushes and wooden barrels as the surrounding fields give way to a more enclosed courtyard. As the character nears the dark entrance, the scene shifts from the wind-swept night into the stillness of the farmhouse interior. The environment then transforms into a dimly lit space illuminated by paper lanterns, where the camera moves past wooden shelves and villagers sitting on the floor.
